channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 15.5%.

item.title: Sky News Politics: Burnham lines up potential return to Westminster to battle Starmer for leadership
item.description: Burnham lines up potential return to Westminster to battle Starmer for leadership

item.title: BBC Politics: Andy Burnham to make bid to return to Commons as pressure mounts on Starmer
item.description: Andy Burnham to make bid to return to Commons as pressure mounts on Starmer

item.title: Independent UK Politics: UK joins EU pledge to make it easier to deport migrants in bid to curb illegal crossings
item.description: UK joins EU pledge to make it easier to deport migrants in bid to curb illegal crossings

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer appoints new health secretary
FT UK Politics: Starmer braces for leadership challenge by Burnham
item.description: Starmer braces for leadership challenge by Burnham

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM
item.description: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM

item.title: The Times: Keir Starmer ‘won’t block Andy Burnham from Commons return’ — as it happened - The Times
item.description: Keir Starmer ‘won’t block Andy Burnham from Commons return’ — as it happened - The Times

item.title: The Telegraph: Rayner cleared in tax investigation 24 hours after demanding a decision - The Telegraph
item.description: Rayner cleared in tax investigation 24 hours after demanding a decision - The Telegraph

item.title: Independent UK Politics: New Health Secretary named after Streeting resignation sparks potential Labour leadership contest
item.description: New Health Secretary named after Streeting resignation sparks potential Labour leadership contest

item.title: The Guardian: Who is Josh Simons, the Labour MP who quit for Andy Burnham? - The Guardian
item.description: Who is Josh Simons, the Labour MP who quit for Andy Burnham? - The Guardian
